text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm meeting with Seiun Sky today to prepare for
tomorrow's scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Once I round the corner, I'll act like I've lost my
footing. Then at the end, I'll lose on purpose and
make them underestimate me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, the simulation went perfect. They're gonna
fall right into my trap. ♪
choice_data_list: So, you're preparing to win when it counts.
So, you're preparing to win when it counts.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You know it. ...All right, now I that I've got my
plan all worked out, it's time for some shut-eye.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text: I'm coming in.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The senior trainer of our opponent in the
scrimmage opens the door.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I'm just dropping by to discuss tomorrow's race,
but what was that I heard about "shut-eye"?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Shut-eye? That's ridiculous! Hahaha... You
must have misheard.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Geez... That poor attitude of yours just goes to
show how lousy a job your trainer's doing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hey now. My trainer never listens no
matter how much I talk about skipping practice—
choice_data_list: I apologize. I've been too lenient.
I apologize. I've been too lenient.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Get them to underestimate us—if that's her goal,
then I'm on board... I look at her, hoping she gets
the message.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, okay? You've clearly got no idea what
it takes to be a trainer. And your racer's a running
disaster.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I hope you both take a good look at yourselves
after the race tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, the trainer leaves.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Yup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Seiun Sky arrives at the track for
the scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep ya!
choice_data_list: Why'd you come in your signature racewear?!
Why'd you come in your signature racewear?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I want to look like I'm taking this seriously. I
have to go all in to make my strategy work!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Plus... this is how I get in the zone.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oop, gotta go.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text: Hey, you ready? It's race time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Both racers step into their gates... and they're off!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like she planned, Sky pretends she's losing
her balance as she hits the turn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now all she has to do is tear ahead in a straight
line, then lose in the end so the other racer
underestimates her. But suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sky pulls ahead of the other racer and seizes a
stunning victory!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Phew, I'm beat. That sure was a close one.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Things got real touch-and-go there. Gotta work on my cornering. I wasn't ready for that to mess me up again.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Well I'll say, we really got whooped there. Maybe
you two aren't entirely hopeless.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
But don't go thinking things'll turn out this way
when we race for real. Heh, we got some juicy
tidbits outta this... Well, see ya.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh-heh... Juicy tidbits, huh? Good for you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
They really had me sweating today. But I got the
win!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well... yeah.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Guess I couldn't help myself. Teehee! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky won't give me a serious answer. I can't
help but wonder why she went against her own
plan...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky won't give me a serious answer. I can't
help but wonder why she went against her own
plan...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? What in the world are you thanking me for?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, don't you think I deserve a
reward? I did win, after all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Nice job! Go take the rest of the day off!" That'd
be the nicest way to say it, I think! ♪
choice_data_list: Could you ask for something besides a break?
Could you ask for something besides a break?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, don't be selfish. I'm your adorable racer!
You're supposed to take good care of me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Actually, that was your cue to make a joke.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hold on a sec... What're you grinning for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trying to get a grip on Seiun Sky is like grasping
at a cloud, but even so, I feel like I've come to
understand her a little more.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Bwuh? Don't tell me that race got you all fired
up?
choice_data_list: I want to help you win even more now!
I want to help you win even more now!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Geeez. Come on, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess we can do something for the rest of
the day or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look to the sky and make my vow once more. I'll
help Seiun Sky speed right through the Twinkle
Series and lead her to victory!
